history.text: Northern Nigeria Protectorate placed the territory under outside administration.
Southern Nigeria Protectorate placed the territory under outside administration.
Unification of Nigeria brought separate territories into one political framework.
Declared independent as a sovereign state announced a new political claim or state form.
Nigeria became a republic, replacing the previous constitutional arrangement.
The current constitution came into force, setting the basic framework for today's Nigeria.
